output.headline: Clean night: 9 intake records promoted, 41 turn atoms composted, heartbeat 0.62
bullets: Intake promotion moved 9 records into the knowledge base and skipped 3.
Lifecycle passes retired 41 turn atoms and demoted 12 stale ones.
Community detection wrote 3 nodes; compression heartbeat is 0.62.
Grove ingest indexed 17 messages; 2 insights and 5 chunks were synthesized.

output.headline: Nightly run hit a Postgres error in community detection; everything else landed
bullets: Community detection (atom grouping) failed with: connection already closed. 0 community nodes written; heartbeat fell back to 0.5.
The rest of the run completed: 38 atoms composted, 10 demoted, 4 intake records promoted.
Grove ingest indexed 5 messages; 1 insight and 2 chunks were synthesized.
attention_items: Check Postgres health around the nightly window — community pass error: connection already closed.
